expectations.text: Response uses createColumnHelper<Order>() for type safety
expectations.evidence: Code includes: const columnHelper = createColumnHelper<Order>(); and uses columnHelper.accessor() for all column definitions
Code imports SortingState, uses useState<SortingState>([]), and passes getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel() and onSortingChange: setSorting to useReactTable
Code imports ColumnFiltersState, uses useState<ColumnFiltersState>([]), and passes getFilteredRowModel: getFilteredRowModel() and onColumnFiltersChange: setColumnFilters to useReactTable

expectations.text: Response renders status column with Badge component
expectations.evidence: Status column cell renders <Badge variant={getStatusBadgeVariant(status)}> with a function mapping each OrderStatus to a variant (default, secondary, outline, destructive)

expectations.text: Response uses shadcn/ui Table components with flexRender
expectations.evidence: Code imports Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow from @/components/ui/table and uses flexRender for both header and cell rendering
